title: CRUD in Python (Flask) + PostgreSQL
description: A minimal CRUD application with a Python (Flask) backend that serves its own HTML interface, persisting data in PostgreSQL. A good starting point to study how a stateless Deployment connects to a stateful database within the same Namespace.

title: CRUD in Python (Flask) + MongoDB
description: A minimal CRUD application with a Python (Flask) backend that serves its own HTML interface, persisting data in MongoDB. A good companion to the PostgreSQL CRUD Template to compare a document-oriented datastore with a relational one, using the same stateless Deployment + stateful storage pattern.

title: Cache-aside in Python (Flask) + PostgreSQL + Redis
description: A CRUD application backed by PostgreSQL that adds a Redis cache-aside layer in front of its listing endpoint, with TTL plus active invalidation on writes. A good starting point to study the cache-aside pattern and how a stateless Deployment can depend on more than one stateful component within the same Namespace.
